samples.title: Magical Girl Rock
samples.prompt: Anime Songs for Japanese 80s Magical Girl, rock, female vocal, upbeat, positive, groovy, passionate
samples.lyrics_excerpt:
[Intro]

[Verse1]
I was just a girl, with dreams so sweet
Wishing on a star, a magical feat
A tiny friend, from a distant land
Gave me a gift, a magic wand

[Chorus]
Now I'm a magical girl, soaring high
With a twinkle in my eye, I'll touch the sky
Transforming with a spell, a brand new me
Adventures await, as destiny decrees

[Verse2]
I look up to him, with a heart so pure
A guiding light, forever to endure
With every spell, I'll learn and grow
Discovering myself, as I let my spirit flow

[Chorus]
Now I'm a magical girl, soaring high
With a twinkle in my eye, I'll touch the sky
Transforming with a spell, a brand new me
Adventures await, as destiny decrees

[Bridge]
Magic is a mystery, a wonder to behold
A world of enchantment, stories yet untold
I'll face my fears, and chase my dreams
With courage and hope, it all seems

[Chorus]
Now I'm a magical girl, soaring high
With a twinkle in my eye, I'll touch the sky
Transforming with a spell, a brand new me
Adventures await, as destiny decrees

[Outro]
'Cause I'm a magical girl, so bold!
With magic in my heart, my story unfolds

[Coda]
samples.feedback_excerpt: A follows the rock style specified in the prompt, but the vocal is not female. B, on the other hand, uses a female vocal but is not rock—it's closer to jazz. As a result, both have issues with instruction following. In terms of musical quality, B has more balanced audio mixing.

samples.title: Trap Aggressive Bass-heavy
samples.lyrics_excerpt:
[Verse]
Quartiere infuocato, giorni di sfida,
Fuggi dalla sirena, resta in vita.
Trafficante d'incubi, sogni in combustione,
Nuovo giorno in strada, cercando redenzione.

[Verse 2]
Volano colpi, schizzano vialetti,
Sangue su asfalto, cercando riflessi.
Ragazzi in guerra, pronti per rivalsa,
Fino all'ultimo respiro, senza una pausa.

[Chorus]
Nella notte buia del quartiere,
Vecchi amici diventano guerrieri.
Sogni spezzati da colpi di magnum,
Ma nessuno si arrende, cuore di platino.

[Verse 3]
Mascherine nere, passi silenziosi,
Occhi aperti, cuori pericolosi.
Patto col diavolo, regole spezzate,
Solo i più forti reggono queste strade.

[Bridge]
Sirene urlanti, vite in bilico,
Scelte fatali, destino critico.
Patti di sangue, nessuna fiducia,
La notte s'infittisce, paura e astuzia.

[Chorus]
Nella notte buia del quartiere,
Vecchi amici diventano guerrieri.
Sogni spezzati da colpi di magnum,
Ma nessuno si arrende, cuore di platino.
samples.feedback_excerpt: I prefer B for its instruction following. A is missing bass-heaviness. However, overall the quality of music is better in A.

samples.title: Japanese Folk Synth-pop
samples.feedback_excerpt: I prefer B because it has more balance mixing quality. A sounds too experimental. Both don't sound like following Japanese style much.

samples.title: Dramatic Intense Hip-hop
samples.lyrics_excerpt:
[Verse]
Rats in the alley, shadows got 'em stumblin'
Cloak of the night, got the whole town mumbin'
Teeth sharp, got that cheese in their sight
Rat King rules, perched high on the fight

[Verse 2]
Two brave souls, backpack full of TNT
Whisper plans, gotta take down the colony
Sneakin' through the pipes, hear the murmur underground
Grit between their teeth, hearts poundin' like a drum sound

[Chorus]
Rat King reign, bombs away
Echoes in the sewers, night turns to day
Rodent army scurries, kingdom starts to sway
Standing tall, these heroes, blowing fear away

[Verse 3]
Rat King's throne, built on trash and grime
Regal crown of tin, ruling over slime
Hierarchy of filth, kingdom in disguise
Two heroes step up, bombs ready to surprise

[Bridge]
Ticking time, crimson wires glimmering
Bravery cold as ice, no one trembling
Rat eyes wide, shadows closing near
Explosion's about to burst, ending all the fear

[Chorus]
Rat King reign, bombs away
Echoes in the sewers, night turns to day
Rodent army scurries, kingdom starts to sway
Standing tall, these heroes, blowing fear away
samples.feedback_excerpt: I prefer B in its instruction following. B matches the style prompt (hiphop) better. I slightly prefer A in its music quality since it has more consistent musical structure than A.

samples.title: 90s Rap
samples.lyrics_excerpt:
[Verse 1]
You’ve been knocked down, but you rise even higher  
Pain tried to break you, but it fueled your fire  
Failures aren’t endings; they’re steps to your crown  
You’re a warrior—nothing will keep you down

The world may hit hard, but you hit back stronger  
You’ve come too far to give up any longer  
Every setback’s a lesson, every scar’s your proof  
You’re unbreakable, now stand in your truth

[Chorus]
You are unstoppable, born to succeed  
From the ashes you rise, unchained and freed  
The power’s within, it’s your time to claim  
You’re the master of your life, forever untamed

[Verse 2]
You’ve turned pain into strength, every fall’s a gain  
The struggle built you, now you own your lane  
Don’t fear the storm, you are the thunder  
Success is your destiny, don’t let them wonder

Each trial made you stronger, no more holding back  
You’re destined for greatness, stay on the attack  
The future is yours, let your spirit soar  
You’ve conquered the darkness—now shine evermore!

[Chorus]
You are unstoppable, born to succeed  
From the ashes you rise, unchained and freed  
The power’s within, it’s your time to claim  
You’re the master of your life, forever untamed
samples.feedback_excerpt: Both A and B fail to adhere to the “90s rap” prompt, since neither features rap vocals. Musically, A is composed of overly experimental, artificial-sounding elements that lack cohesion, while B is limited to a digital-voice a cappella without accompaniment, making both unsatisfactory.
